events.text: Silvan Widmer (Switzerland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Serbia 0, Switzerland 1. Xherdan Shaqiri (Switzerland) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Djibril Sow.
Goal!  Serbia 1, Switzerland 1. Aleksandar Mitrovic (Serbia) header from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Dusan Tadic with a cross   following a fast break.
Rubén Vargas (Switzerland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Serbia 2, Switzerland 1. Dusan Vlahovic (Serbia) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner.
Goal!  Serbia 2, Switzerland 2. Breel Embolo (Switzerland) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Silvan Widmer.
Sergej Milinkovic-Savic (Serbia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Serbia 2, Switzerland 3. Remo Freuler (Switzerland) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Rubén Vargas.
Strahinja Pavlovic (Serbia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Predrag Rajkovic (Serbia) is shown the yellow card.
Nemanja Gudelj (Serbia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Aleksandar Mitrovic (Serbia) is shown the yellow card.
Granit Xhaka (Switzerland) is shown the yellow card.
Nikola Milenkovic (Serbia) is shown the yellow card.
Fabian Schär (Switzerland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Sasa Lukic (Serbia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
